Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID BLUMENFELD FOR PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER NUTTER AND TIMOTHY ZAMBELLI, WHO ARE ALSO PRESENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY J.WALLACE OMAN FOR DEFENDANT JAMES G. GIRARD AND ROBERT B. GADDY, WHO ARE ALSO PRESENT

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. ON THE RECORD,PARTIES ENTER INTO A STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE TO FEBRUARY 6, 2006 IN OPEN COURT PENDING RULING BY JUDGE WARREN ON PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WHICH WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON DEC-29-2005.

JUDGE PRO TEM WILL CHEN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony, Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony, Production of Documents: Granted. Defendants are ordered to appear for deposition on a date to be agreed upon after meet and confer, but no later than January 5, 2006. The court finds circumstances which make the imposition of sanctions unjust. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Blumenfeld, Esq. of Woo & Assoc., 415-281-6800 for plaintiffs and moving parties TODD ROBINS, DELPHINE RENARD, AMEY NUTTER, CHRISTOPHER NUTTER, TIMOTHY ZAMBELLI.
James Girard and Robert Gaddy, 415-621-7189, defendants and opposing parties in propria persona.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling AND TOOK UNDER SUBMISSION
